home.title: Move playlists. Keep your taste.
home.desc: Paste a public Spotify playlist URL — we match every track against the Apple Music catalog and hand you a clean deep-link list (and a .m3u8) to bring it home.
home.step1Desc: Paste a public Spotify URL, or pick from your own playlists after signing in.
home.step2Desc: Fuzzy match against the Apple Music catalog, with confidence scores you can override.
home.step3Desc: Get a tappable deep-link list — or a .m3u8 file for the macOS Music app.
home.betaNote: Beta. Apple Music doesn't permit programmatic add-to-library, so the final step is a deep link list — you tap, Apple Music adds.

import.publicOnly: Public playlists only. Set the playlist to public on Spotify first if needed.
import.title: Import a Spotify playlist
import.desc: Paste a public Spotify playlist URL and we'll pull the tracks. No sign-in required.
import.errorNotFound: Playlist not found or private — make sure the link is publicly accessible.
import.errorBadGateway: Spotify changed their embed page — please try again, or report this.
import.tip1: Paste any public Spotify playlist URL — works for both https://open.spotify.com/playlist/[id]?si=… and bare IDs.
import.tip2: Up to 100 tracks per playlist (Spotify embed limit). Spotify's algorithmic playlists like "Today's Top Hits" cap at 50.
import.tip3: No sign-in. We never see your Spotify account.

match.missingDesc: We couldn't find this playlist in your session. Head back to import to start over.

export.missingDesc: We couldn't find matched results in your session. Start a new migration.
export.title: Export to Apple Music
export.noneIncluded: You excluded every track on the previous step — nothing to export.
export.deepLinkDesc: Tap any link to jump straight to Apple Music. Hover the song row's right edge — click + to add to library, or ⋯ → Add to Playlist.
export.deepLinkPlatformHint: On iPhone / iPad / Mac with Apple Music installed, links open straight in the Music app. On other platforms they open in your browser's web player.
export.copiedToast: Copied {n, plural, one {# link} other {# links}}.
export.shortcutDesc: Run our Apple Shortcut to push every matched track into one playlist — fully on-device, via Apple's iTunes Store search action.
export.shortcutPlatformWarn: iPhone / iPad only — the Shortcut won't run on Mac. On Mac, use the deep-link list on the left to add tracks one at a time.
export.shortcutCopiedToast: Copied {n, plural, one {# line} other {# lines}} for the Shortcut.
export.shortcutHint3: Run "TXT to Apple Music Playlist" — paste the list, name your playlist, done.

settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Storefront, appearance, and the Apple Music developer token.
settings.storefrontDesc: Two-letter region code used when searching the Apple Music catalog.
settings.appearanceDesc: Theme, surface, navigation, accent, and language.
settings.tokenDesc: JWT used to call Apple's catalog. Loaded server-side from environment configuration.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.desc: An unexpected error reached this page. You can try again, or head back home.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist (or has moved).
